holdings.infoBox: EPMB is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are Woodward stock at 3.61%, Us Dollar at 3.43%, Keysight Technologies at 3.42%, Entegris at 3.09%, and Cummins at 2.90%.

overview.description: The Harbor Mid Cap Core ETF (EPMB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in 50-70 mid-cap companies in the US, selected using fundamental research. The fund seeks total return. EPMB was launched on May 1, 2025 and is issued by Harbor.
